Louis Paulet - Data Scientist

Introduction

Welcome to the personal GitHub page of Louis Paulet, a talented data scientist with a passion for artificial intelligence and machine learning. Specializing in AI-generated art, Louis is on the lookout for new opportunities to grow and apply his skills in the field of data science. Explore his exceptional projects, ranging from AI-generated art to advanced machine learning applications, and discover why Louis is the perfect candidate for your data science team.

Projects

AI-Generated Art

Using advanced techniques such as Stable Diffusion and Latent Diffusion, Louis has created mesmerizing AI-generated art pieces. Check out the project at https://the_french_artist.artstation.com/.

ETL and NLP Experiments

This repository contains a collection of Jupyter notebooks that demonstrate various natural language processing (NLP) techniques and an ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process on a dataset of French painters. Check out the project at https://github.com/louispaulet/ETL_tests.

OpenAI CLIP Image Text Similarity

This repository contains a Flask and React-based web application for finding the best matching text description for a set of images using OpenAI's CLIP model. Check out the project at https://github.com/louispaulet/OpenAI_CLIP-REACT-FLASK.

MNIST-KERAS-FLASK-JS

This repository contains a simple web application that uses Keras and Flask to create an MNIST digit recognition model. Check out the project at https://github.com/louispaulet/MNIST-KERAS-FLASK-JS.

Contact

Connect with Louis on: GitHub and LinkedIn
